Geolocation.iosLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Fleet Apex Driver uses your location to track route progress and report hazards.
Geolocation.iosLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Fleet Apex Driver uses your location in the background to track active trips.

Camera.iosCameraUsageDescription: Fleet Apex Driver uses the camera to photograph road hazards.
Camera.iosPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Fleet Apex Driver can attach existing photos to hazard reports.
